Let me know if you change your "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["mind."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":true,"switch1_id":3,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"phone001","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bOak: Well, which one do you want?"]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":2,"name":"Turn back, size(3,1)","x":5,"y":8,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":29,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This event is size 3x1. It is 3 tiles wide and 1 tile tall. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["An event\u0027s size can be set by adding \u0022size(x,y)\u0022 in the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["event\u0027s name, where x and y are numbers."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The event\u0027s placed position determines the bottom "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["left tile occupied by the event in-game."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["There are a lot of reasons to change an event\u0027s size. "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Here, it is covering the whole distance between the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["bookshelves with just one event, rather than needing "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["three events that do the same thing."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":true,"switch1_id":3,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":1,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bOak: Wait, don\u0027t leave yet!"]},{"c":209,"i":0,"p":[-1,{"_class":"RPG::MoveRoute","@list":[{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":22},{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":12},{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":0}],"@skippable":false,"@repeat":false}]},{"c":509,"i":0,"p":[{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":22}]},{"c":509,"i":0,"p":[{"_class":"RPG::MoveCommand","@parameters":[],"@code":12}]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":13,"name":"Dex access","x":3,"y":10,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_SCIENTIST","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The numbers used for $Trainer.pokedex.lock(x) and "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["$Trainer.pokedex.unlock(x) are the ones defined in "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["the PBS file \u0022regionaldexes.txt\u0022 for the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["corresponding Regional Dex."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["The National Dex is not defined in that PBS file. It "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["uses the number -1 here."]},{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Start"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\bI can control your Pok\u00E9dex access. What do you "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["want me to do?"]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Kanto Dex access","Johto Dex access","National Dex access","Exit"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Kanto Dex access"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bWhat about it?"]},{"c":102,"i":1,"p":[["Unlock Kanto Dex","Lock Kanto Dex","Exit"],3]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[0,"Unlock Kanto Dex"]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["$player.pokedex.unlock(0)"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\bThe Kanto Dex was unlocked."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[1,"Lock Kanto locked."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[2,"Exit"]},{"c":119,"i":2,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Johto Dex carefully!"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":29,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":true,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

{"id":10,"name":"Wall sign left","x":6,"y":1,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["The event next to the Professor contains the autorun "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["commands."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["There are two times it does something: when the "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["player first enters the map, and when the player has "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["chosen a starter."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["The second time is on a higher page number. Page "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["numbers go in order of first to last cutscene, "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["including pages for pauses between them if relevant."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
